attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT SICD.BATCH_ID, SICD.OBJECT_ID, SICD.OPTY_ID, SICD.OPTY_NUMBER, SICD.OPTY_NAME, SICD.CREATED_ON, SICD.CREATED_BY, SICD.UPDATED_ON, SICD.UPDATED_BY, SICD.APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BY_DATE, SICD.DEAL_EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE, SICD.REVENUE_RECOG_FLAG, SICD.PROD_SALES_PATH, SICD.SERV_SALES_PATH, SICD.FIRST_INSTALLATION_DT, SICD.MDM_OPTY_DESC_STRATEGIC_VALUE, SICD.VERTICAL_MARKET, SICD.MDM_PROD_VALUE, SICD.MDM_SERV_VALUE, SICD.DM_UPDATE_DATE, SICD.QF_FORM_ID, SICD.REOPEN_REASON, SICD.QF_FORM_STATUS, SICD.DDA_DEAL_DURATION, SICD.LAST_APPROVAL_DATE, SICD.DEAL_DURATION, SICD.DEAL_TYPE, SICD.DEAL_TYPE_NAME, SICD.DEAL_CREATOR_ROLE, SICD.DEAL_CREATOR_ROLE_NAME, SICD.EXPECTED_CLOSE_DATE, SICD.ACTIVE_WORKFLOW, SICD.MDM_DEAL_STATUS, SICD.MDM_DEAL_EXPIRATION_DATE, SICD.PDR_PROD_VALUE, SICD.PDR_SERV_VALUE, SICD.SFDC_OPTY_ID, SICD.QUOTE_FLAG, SICD.DEAL_OR_QUOTE, SICD.PDR_OPTY_DESC_STRATEGIC_VALUE, SICD.SFDC_ACTIVE_FLAG, SICD.PARENT_OBJECT_ID, SICD.DEAL_SCOPE, SICD.DEAL_SCOPE_NAME, SICD.MERGED_SFDC_OPTY_ID, SICD.OPTY_STATUS, SICD.CREATOR_PAE_USER_ID, SICD.CDP_FLAG, SICD.LEGACY_FLAG, SICD.RFP_FLAG, SICD.MDM_OPTY_DESC_STRATEGIC_DESC, SICD.BUSINESS_SCENARIO, SICD.PUBLISH_DISCOUNT_FLAG, SICD.DEAL_SOURCE, SICD.DEAL_SOURCE_NAME, SICD.CUSTOMER_USE_CASE, SICD.CUSTOMER_USE_SOLUTION, SICD.SFDC_INTEGRATION_FLAG, SICD.MDM_DEAL_STATUS_NAME, SICD.PROGRAM_NAME, SICD.DEAL_OBJECT_ID, SICD.SUBMIT_DATE, SICD.FINAL_BAND, SICD.FINANCIAL_SUMMARY, SICD.SOURCE_OPTY_NUMBER, SICD.CREATE_DATETIME, SICD.ACTION_CODE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_INT_CQ_DEAL SICD
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( 
SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_DEAL ELCD
where
SICD.OPTY_NUMBER=ELCD.OPTY_NUMBER
AND SICD.OBJECT_ID=ELCD.OBJECT_ID)
